values.content: You are an AI that analyses Google Maps business data. Output only valid JSON with exactly two fields: companySummary and painPoints. Write in English, professional tone.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

values.content: You write short cold outreach emails for Pankaj, an AI automation consultant. His service: he builds AI-powered automations that handle bookings, customer enquiries, and lead follow-up automatically — so business owners stop doing it manually. Emails must sound human, be under 120 words, reference something specific about the business, and connect their specific pain to AI automation as the fix. No buzzwords. No corporate tone. Output valid JSON with fields: subject, body, painPoints.

parameters.text:
=✅ Scrape complete!

All leads saved to Google Sheets. Cold emails sent where email addresses were found.

parameters.content:
## Google Maps Lead Scraper V3

**Telegram format:**
`sector ; limit ; google_maps_url`

**Example:**
`restaurants ; 10 ; https://www.google.com/maps/search/restaurants+london`

**V3 improvements over original:**
✅ Skips businesses already in your sheet
✅ Uses stable Apify node package
✅ 5 min scrape timeout
✅ jsonOutput on AI nodes (no parsing bugs)

parameters.jsCode:
// The loop's 'done' output passes all processed items — we only want ONE notification
return [{ json: { done: true } }];
